failure_modes.text: Over-reliance on the mean can hide low-probability, high-impact outcomes that matter more than the base case.
failure_modes.mitigation: Report the full distribution, not just the expected value: require decision-makers to acknowledge tail scenarios and state what level of downside they can absorb.

failure_modes.text: Availability and representativeness can distort probability estimates by privileging vivid stories over statistical fit.
failure_modes.mitigation: Calibrate estimates against base rates and reference classes before adjusting for case-specific details; flag any estimate that deviates sharply from the outside view.

failure_modes.text: False precision can make uncertainty look solved when the team is really only hiding what it does not know.
failure_modes.mitigation: Label confidence intervals honestly: when uncertainty is high, widen the range rather than narrowing it for false comfort, and flag any precision that exceeds the data quality.

premortem_questions.text: Is the worst case bad enough?
What data is missing that might spoil our story?
premortem_questions.source_quote: "What data is missing that might spoil our story?"

premortem_questions.text: What percentage confidence do I have in this estimate, and what information would narrow that range?
premortem_questions.source_quote: "What percentage confidence do I have in this estimate, and what information would narrow that range?"

heuristics.text: Frame decisions as expected-value calculations instead of looking for options with no downside at all.
Decorrelate errors by collecting independent probability judgments before group discussion starts.
heuristics.source_quote: Obtain multiple, independent judgments or probabilistic assessments on the issue before any group discussion.

heuristics.text: Run sensitivity analysis and communicate uncertainty ranges explicitly instead of pretending to know more than you do.

curation_notes.summary: The source is naturally chunk-ready on uncertainty discipline, biased estimates, and explicit probability communication.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor forecasting overlays that widened beyond the raw source's stronger uncertainty-discipline playbook.
open_questions: The second heuristic is slightly compressed from the mitigation table so it stays compact as a reusable intervention chunk.

allies: The raw allies section is strong on systems thinking, hypothesis-driven problem solving, and metacognition for later relation preservation.
antagonists: The raw antagonists section is strong on confirmation bias, framing effects, and System 1 distortions.
structured_tensions: The source lacks an explicit structured tension block, so any later tension preservation should stay conservative and review-first.
